SEARCH:
程序包 org.graphstream.stream.binary

接口 ByteEncoder

所有超级接口:
AttributeSink, ElementSink, Sink
所有已知实现类:
NetStreamEncoder
public interface ByteEncoder extends Sink
Define an encoder that transform received events into a binary buffer.

A ByteEncoder is a sink that will produce a ByteBuffer from each received event. Then these buffer can be sent to an end-point using a ByteEncoder.Transport.

This is a generic way to define the encoding of events into bytes buffer. The main protocol used in GraphStream to do such things is NetStream, with is dedicated encoder NetStreamEncoder.

从以下版本开始:
31/01/16.

  • 嵌套类概要

    嵌套类
    修饰符和类型
    接口
    说明
    static interface 
    ByteEncoder.Transport
    Define the object that will be called after an event has been transformed into a binary buffer.

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    void
    addTransport(ByteEncoder.Transport transport)
    Add a new transport to this encoder.
    void
    removeTransport(ByteEncoder.Transport transport)
    Remove an existing transport from this encoder.

    从接口继承的方法 org.graphstream.stream.AttributeSink

    edgeAttributeAdded, edgeAttributeChanged, edgeAttributeRemoved, graphAttributeAdded, graphAttributeChanged, graphAttributeRemoved, nodeAttributeAdded, nodeAttributeChanged, nodeAttributeRemoved

    从接口继承的方法 org.graphstream.stream.ElementSink

    edgeAdded, edgeRemoved, graphCleared, nodeAdded, nodeRemoved, stepBegins

  • 方法详细资料

    • addTransport

      void addTransport(ByteEncoder.Transport transport)
      Add a new transport to this encoder.
      参数:
      transport - the new transport

    • removeTransport

      void removeTransport(ByteEncoder.Transport transport)
      Remove an existing transport from this encoder.
      参数:
      transport - the transport to remove
